case_title: CYNTHIA E. RODRIGUEZ VS. EDWARD LEONARD KLEMAN et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL -REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL. FILED BY DEFENDANT R & L DISTRIBUTING, INC.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,573.95 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, CYNTHIA E. AS TO DEFENDANT KLEMAN, EDWARD LEONARD R & L DISTRIBUTING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED MAY-22-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT R & L DISTRIBUTING, INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, CYNTHIA E.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSON. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT EDWARD KLEMAN WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSON. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-01-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, CYNTHIA E. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KLEMAN, EDWARD LEONARD R & L DISTRIBUTING, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE, "SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL/DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND". (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, CYNTHIA E. AS TO DEFENDANT KLEMAN, EDWARD LEONARD
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT R & L DISTRIBUTING, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL -GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-12-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BETSY JOHNSON FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, CYNTHIA E. KLEMAN, EDWARD LEONARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2012 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
